text:
The following page is an overall list of all-time appearances in every media of the character Lyra from the Fullmetal Alchemist franchise.
After Episode 33, Lyra's body is taken from her and used by Dante. This list only includes appearances of Lyra as herself. To see the appearances of her stolen body, see here.

Television

Fullmetal Alchemist (2003 anime)

Episodes (4/51)

Episode 9: Be Thou for the People (flashback)
Episode 29: The Untainted Child (flashback)
Episode 32: Dante of the Deep Forest
Episode 33: Al, Captured
Episode 34: Theory of Avarice (In Dante's deceased body)

Films

Conqueror of Shamballa (counterpart)

Video Games
